_doc: DC2 code-input puzzles. DC2 has ONE: the sub-level elevator keypad. Candidates are imm32s in the setup function, not a flat data table; the active code is picked at runtime (prng()&7) into scene_mgr+0x1204, which both display and check read — displayed==checked is automatic. K108.

elevator_code_table.digit_encoding: byte per digit, first displayed digit = lowest byte, RAW (no +1)
elevator_code_table.digit_alphabet: 0-5 only (vanilla constraint; 6-9 unproven on the keypad UI)

document.name: Elevator Security Code
document.display: renderer token 6 substitutes digits from scene+0x1204 at draw time; no static text to rewrite
